title: What's new in Traktor Pro / Play 4.4.2

hardwareMentions.matchedText: Auto-config for Pioneer DJM-A9 Plug-and-play support has been added for the Pioneer DJM-A9
DDJ-FLX2 and DDJ-FLX4 do not default to WASAPI Exclusive Mode The DDJ-FLX2 and DDJ-FLX4 now correctly default to WASAPI Exclusive Mode
DDJ-FLX2 and DDJ-FLX4 do not default to WASAPI Exclusive Mode The DDJ-FLX2 and DDJ-FLX4 now correctly default to WASAPI Exclusive Mode
esolves caching problems observed for Beatport Previews on Windows, and enables S2 MK3 controller compatibility for Traktor Play
0 is a feature update adding Z1 MK2 user mappability, support for two Z1 MK2 controllers and several improvements and bug fixes
MX2 ASIO Driver Auto-Selection After installing the MX2 ASIO drivers are now always automatically selected on first launch
